title: Smoky Italian Pizza
description: A classic Italian pizza with smoky flavor, perfect for a quick meal. The combination of mozzarella cheese and toasted crust makes this dish a delight.

ingredients.name: Smoky Italian seasoning
ingredients.notes: Mix of oregano, basil, and thyme

instructions: Roll out the pre-baked crust to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Spread the tomato sauce over the crust, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the mozzarella cheese over the sauce.
Sprinkle the smoky Italian seasoning over the cheese.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the pizza from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh basil.
Let the pizza cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
